case_title: ESRI INVESTMENTS, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED et al VS. JOSEPH TIERNEY et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESRI INVESTMENTS, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY 1250 MISSOURI STREET, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TIERNEY, JOSEPH AN INDIVIDUALLY DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-04-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-03-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-19-2012
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESRI INVESTMENTS, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY 1250 MISSOURI STREET, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED DEC-13-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TIERNEY, JOSEPH AN INDIVIDUALLY
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-12-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JOSEPH TIERNEY'S (AMENDED) MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AND STAYING JUDICIAL PROCEEDINGS IS DENIED. THE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION CLAUSE IN THE AGREEMENT TO PURCHASE AND SELL PROPERTY FOR A 50% INTEREST IN THE RIGHT, TITLE AND INTEREST IN PROPERTY DEFINED AS 1250 MISSOURI STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CCP 1298(C). THE AGREEMENT IS EXPRESSLY ONE FOR THE CONVEYANCE OF REAL PROPERTY, AND ACCORDINGLY 1298 APPLIES. DEFENDANT DOES NOT CONTEST THAT THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT HERE DOES NOT COMPLY WITH 1298. JUDGE KARNOW DISCLOSES THAT IN EXCESS OF EIGHT YEARS AGO ON APPROXIMATELY TWO OCCASIONS HE WAS RETAINED AND HIS LAW FIRM WAS PAID BY ATTORNEY WILLIAM FARRER, AND PERHAPS HIS OPPOSING COUNSEL, TO MEDIATE CASES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS E. A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-29-2012 CONTINUED TO OCT-10-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

(Amended) Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Contractural Arbitration And Staying Judicial Proceedings And Pos
Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ross McLauran Madden, Esq. of the Law Offices of Ross Madden, Tel. 415.567.1212, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOSEPH TIERNEY's (Amended) Motion For Order Compelling Contractual Arbitration And Staying Judicial Proceedings is Denied. The contractual arbitration clause in the Agreement to Purchase and Sell Property for a 50% interest in the right, title and interest in property defined as 1250 Missouri Street, San Francisco, California does not comply with CCP 1298(c). The Agreement is expressly one for the conveyance of real property, and accordingly 1298 applies. Defendant does not contest that the arbitration agreement here does not comply with 1298. Judge Karnow discloses that in excess of eight years ago on approximately two occasions he was retained and his law firm was paid by Attorney William Farrer, and perhaps his opposing counsel, to mediate cases. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

(Amended) Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Contractural Arbitration And Staying Judicial Proceedings And Pos
